title: Funding for national professional qualifications: eligible settings
body: "Scholarship funding, based on disadvantage criteria, is available for the following national professional qualifications (NPQs):   leading teaching leading behaviour and culture leading literacy leading primary mathematics senior leadership executive leadership early years leadership  leading teacher development     The eligible settings are fixed for the autumn 2025 recruitment period.   Read funding for national professional qualifications (NPQs) to understand when and how the eligible settings lists apply.  "
